ab: Lleay, ullaya yu i ruma?
en: Lleay, are you home?

ab: ullaya ku i ruma. usabak i!
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Lleay, ullaya yu i ruma?
en: Lleay, are you home?

ab: uniyan i ruma i Lleay. i Irubay ku. a manay nu bangabangan? an muruma i Lleay i, ti rengayaw lla.
ch: B:Lleay不在家耶!我是Irubay，有什麼事嗎？ 回來我會轉告Lleay。
en: Lleay is not at home. I am Irubay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: i manay mu?
en: Who are you?

ab: mumu, i Araytay kay Lleay mi. truwalli driya na alleban!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Araytay和Lleay，幫我們開門！
en: Grandma, we are Araytay and Lleay, please open the door for us.

ab: i manay?
en: Who is it?

ab: i Buya ku. maaya ku kane Utay.
en: I am Buya, I am here for Utay.

ab: mumu, druwa ku menauwa kanu.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: paetreng yu lla adri druwa. masupeng ku kanu i!
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你耶！
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Lleay, druwa ku muwadrangiya.
en: Lleay, I am here to play with you.

ab: kamelamu usabak i! paetreng ku lla mengangara kanu.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: nanku sinalem na bunga idrini. tallami a!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看！
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: dallau idri na bunga i!
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: alamu driya! nanku sinalem na kalimudan idrini. tallami a!
ch: A:過來！這是我種的水果，吃看看！
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: dallau idri na kalimudan i!
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: katengadraw driya. nanku sinalem na kadumu idrini. adri pinuka dra puwatremel. tallami a!
ch: A:請坐！這是我種的有機玉米吃看看！
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: wa! dalleu idri na kadumu i!
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: aekan yu dra asiru?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: adri ku karuwa mekan dra asiru. mekana ku dra linggo.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: aekan yu dra ping-kan?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: aiwa. sagar ku mekan.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: kemulitra ku dra kalimudan pakan kanu.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: semangalan! mienay idri na kalimudan i!
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: mabaka ku dra enay patrekel kanu.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: semangalan!
en: Thank you.

ab: kasadruyu mekan! sadru ku inabelan.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: wa! salaw ullingull aw imaran i!
ch: B:嗚！ 真的很香也好吃。
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: kasadruyu mekan! ullaya driya a sadru kadrini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: adri ku migela a!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: kasadruyu mekan! ullaya driya a sadru kadrini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: sadru lla ku inekanan. adri ku lla pakaekan.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
